column1: # Pin.board named pins for EV8711FLM (RTL8711FLM / AmebaGreen2).
# Source: Realtek UG1002 EV721FL0 EVB User Guide v1.2
# J20/J21/J22/J23/J26) plus J5/J6 (LOGUART).  Only pins physically routed to a
# header AND usable as GPIO are listed.
# Deliberately excluded (documented as NOT usable as GPIO on this board):
#   PC_2 .. PC_7    -- connected to on-board flash
#   PC_8            -- exists on the SoC but not routed to any header
# Note: several listed pins are "default NC" on the EVB (need a 0-ohm resistor

column4: PC_1); they are still valid GPIO after the rework.
